title: Irrigation Systems
description: Automated or semi-automated irrigation systems attached to one or more locations.

irrigationSystemId.description: Unique identifier for the irrigation system.

locationId.description: Reference to the location where this system is installed.

enabled.description: Whether the irrigation system is currently turned on.

controlMode.description: How the system is controlled: purely manual, advisory suggestions to the user, or fully automated via a backend.

baselineSchedule.description: Description of the default schedule when running normally.

autoSchedule.description: Structured schedule used by eval run to log automatic watering confirmations for attached plants.

cadenceDays.description: Default number of days between automatic irrigation runs.

skipOnRain.description: Skip today's auto event when current weather is rain.

seasonalSchedule.description: Optional per-season overrides for automatic irrigation.

supportsMultipleDailyRuns.description: Whether the timer hardware supports more than one run per day.

minimumDurationStep.description: Smallest duration increment the timer supports, e.g. '1min'.

maximumSafeDuration.description: Longest safe single-run duration before runoff becomes a concern.

runoffRisk.description: Overall risk of water runoff when this system operates.

coverageNotes.description: Free-text notes on which plants and areas the system covers.

knownWeakSpots.description: List of known coverage gaps or problem areas.

manualExceptionPlantIds.description: Plant IDs that are physically on the system but require manual watering exceptions.

lastReviewAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last system review.

notes.description: Free-text notes about this irrigation system.

enabled.description: Whether automatic irrigation runs during this season.

cadenceDays.description: Season-specific number of days between automatic irrigation runs.
